---
title: "Spell Library"
---

Use these as reusable working forms. Each spell page links back to relevant runes and reference pages.

- [Spell of Safe Refactoring](safe-refactoring.qmd)
- [Spell of Bug Diagnosis from Logs](bug-diagnosis-from-logs.qmd)
- [Spell of API Design](api-design.qmd)
- [Spell of Migration Without Data Loss](migration-without-data-loss.qmd)
- [Spell of Test Generation](test-generation.qmd)
- [Spell of Performance Tuning](performance-tuning.qmd)
